description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of light gray and stone-textured walls, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a spacious enclosed courtyard with green grass and a pool. The front facade includes a main entrance door, two large windows, and a small set of steps leading up to the entry. The rear and side elevations reveal additional windows, a sliding glass door, and a partially covered outdoor area. The roof has skylights and a cut-out section above the courtyard, allowing natural light to enter the central space. The overall structure is geometric and open, with clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, stone and gray walls, and a spacious courtyard featuring grass and a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and partial view of the courtyard and pool.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the flat roof, skylights, and the enclosed courtyard with pool.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the expansive glass doors, courtyard with grass, and the rear wall.
description_view_3: Back view showing stone-textured walls, courtyard greenery, and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
